channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TALBROAUTO] Talbros Automotive Components Ltd Independent Director, Mr. Rajat Verma, Resigns Due to Other Professional Commitments
item.description:
Talbros Automotive Components Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Rajat Verma, an Independent Director, with immediate effect due to his other professional commitments. The resignation was tendered on March 13, 2026. Mr. Verma confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation. The company has complied with the necessary disclosure requirements as per the Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular.

  • Mr. Rajat Verma resigns from Talbros Automotive Components Ltd due to other professional commitments.
  • The resignation is effective immediately from March 13, 2026.
  • Mr. Verma confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation.
  • The company has complied with the necessary disclosure requirements.
  • The resignation letter is enclosed as Annexure-B.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TALBROS AUTOMOTIVE COMPONENTS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SOBME] Legends Global Opportunities Singapore Pte Ltd Acquires 6.67% Stake in Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd
item.description:
Legends Global Opportunities Singapore Pte Ltd has acquired 6,50,500 convertible warrants of Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd having a face value of Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 664.49/- each. This acquisition was made on a preferential allotment basis on March 11, 2026. The acquisition results in Legends Global Opportunities holding 6.67% of the total share/voting capital of Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd.

  • Legends Global Opportunities Singapore Pte Ltd acquires 6.67% stake in Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd
  • Acquisition made through preferential allotment of 6,50,500 convertible warrants
  • Warrants have a face value of Rs. 10/- each and a premium of Rs. 664.49/- each
  • Acquisition date is March 11, 2026
  • Sobhagya Mercantile Ltd's total share/voting capital stands at Rs. 97,485,000/- (97,48,500 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each) post-acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOBHAGYA MERCHANTILE LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [QGO] QGO Finance Ltd Allots 500 Unsecured, Unlisted, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) Worth Rs. 5 Crore
item.description:
QGO Finance Ltd has informed the stock exchange about the allotment of 500 Unsecured, Unlisted, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) of Rs. 1,00,000/- each, aggregating to Rs. 5,00,00,000/- (Rupees Five Crore Only). The NCDs have been issued to eligible investors on a Private Placement basis. The tenure of the instrument is 9 years, with a coupon/interest of 12% per annum payable monthly.

  • QGO Finance Ltd allots 500 Unsecured, Unlisted, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs)
  • NCDs worth Rs. 5,00,00,000/- (Rupees Five Crore Only) allotted
  • NCDs issued to eligible investors on a Private Placement basis
  • Tenure of the instrument is 9 years
  • Coupon/interest of 12% per annum payable monthly

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: QGO Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [AVEER] Vishal Rajkumar Chordia Acquires 2,26,087 Equity Shares of Aveer Foods Ltd Through Warrant Exercise
item.description:
Vishal Rajkumar Chordia has acquired 2,26,087 equity shares of Aveer Foods Ltd through the exercise of warrants originally allotted to him on 20 March 2025. The acquisition took place on 11 March 2026. This acquisition has increased his shareholding by 2.26% and his voting rights by 2.26%.

  • Vishal Rajkumar Chordia acquired 2,26,087 equity shares of Aveer Foods Ltd through warrant exercise.
  • The acquisition increased his shareholding by 2.26% and voting rights by 2.26%.
  • The acquisition took place on 11 March 2026.
  • The warrants were originally allotted to him on 20 March 2025.
  • Aveer Foods Ltd equity share capital increased to Rs. 4,48,04,260/- divided into 44,80,426 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aveer Foods Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MSECL] Monarch Surveyors Receives Rs. 4.99 Crores Order for Dam Project in Raigad District
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Ltd has announced that it has received a work order for providing Consultancy Services for Preparation of Detailed Project Report (DPR) with Bidding Process and Assistance in Land Acquisition for Proposed Dam at Village - Chavani, Taluka - Khalapur. District Raigad. The project is awarded under a Joint Venture (JV), in which the Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Limited holds a 70% partnership stake. The total order value of the project is Rs. 4,99,25,000/- (Rupees Four Crores Ninety-Nine Lakhs Twenty-Five Thousand Only).

  • Monarch Surveyors received a work order for a dam project in Raigad district.
  • The project is awarded under a Joint Venture where Monarch Surveyors holds a 70% partnership stake.
  • The total order value of the project is Rs. 4,99,25,000.
  • The project involves providing Consultancy Services for Preparation of Detailed Project Report (DPR) with Bidding Process and Assistance in Land Acquisition.
  • The project is subject to necessary approvals from governmental authorities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Monarch Surveyors and Engineering Consultants Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SUMERUIND] Sumeru Industries Ltd Receives Disclosure of Share Purchase by Mrs. Pooja Raja
item.description:
Sumeru Industries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 from Mrs. Pooja Raja. The disclosure pertains to the purchase of equity shares of the company. The details of the acquisition, as per the disclosure, are provided in the required format. The acquisition includes shares carrying voting rights, shares in the nature of encumbrance, voting rights otherwise than by shares, warrants/convertible securities, and any other instrument that entitles the acquirer to receive shares carrying voting rights in the total capital. The acquisition increases Mrs. Raja's holding in the company.

  • Mrs. Pooja Raja has disclosed the purchase of equity shares of Sumeru Industries Ltd
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
  • The acquisition includes shares carrying voting rights, shares in the nature of encumbrance, voting rights otherwise than by shares, warrants/convertible securities, and any other instrument that entitles the acquirer to receive shares carrying voting rights in the total capital
  • The acquisition increases Mrs. Raja's holding in the company
  • The acquisition details are provided in the required format as per 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUMERU INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SILICON] Silicon Valley Infotech Ltd Approves Scheme for Reduction of Share Capital
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Silicon Valley Infotech Ltd has announced the approval of a scheme for reduction of share capital by shareholders at the EGM held on 9th March 2026. The scheme, which was also approved by the Board of Directors, aims to reduce the company's share capital and list shares post reduction. The reduction of share capital is in accordance with Section 66 and other applicable sections of the Companies Act, 2013, and the National Company Law Tribunal (Procedure for Reduction of Share Capital of Company) Rules, 2016.

  • Silicon Valley Infotech Ltd has approved a scheme for reduction of share capital.
  • The scheme was approved by shareholders at the EGM held on 9th March 2026.
  • The reduction of share capital is in accordance with Section 66 and other applicable sections of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The scheme is also in line with the National Company Law Tribunal (Procedure for Reduction of Share Capital of Company) Rules, 2016.
  • The company aims to reduce its share capital and list shares post reduction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SILICON VALLEY INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Reduction of Share Capital

item.title: [DCMSHRIRAM] DCM Shriram Ltd Secures USD 90 Million Investment from IFC for Sustainability-Linked NCDs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

DCM Shriram Limited, a leading business conglomerate, has announced an investment commitment of USD 90 million from the International Finance Corporation (IFC). The investment will be in the form of subscription to Sustainability-Linked Non-Convertible Debentures (NCD) to be issued by the company. The transaction aligns with globally accepted International Capital Market Associations’ Sustainability-linked Bond Principles and Loan Market Association’s Sustainability-linked Loan Principles. The proceeds will be utilized to strengthen the company’s strategic initiatives and support long-term growth plans, including expanding its downstream chemicals business and fostering local value creation.

  • DCM Shriram Ltd secures USD 90 million investment from IFC
  • Investment in the form of Sustainability-Linked Non-Convertible Debentures (NCD)
  • Proceeds to strengthen strategic initiatives and support long-term growth plans
  • Expansion of downstream chemicals business and local value creation
  • Alignment with International Capital Market Associations’ Sustainability-linked Bond Principles and Loan Market Association’s Sustainability-linked Loan Principles

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram Limited | Category: Investment

item.title: [COSPOWER] Swapna Gunda Acquires 1.62 Lakh Shares of Cospower Engineering Ltd via Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Swapna Gunda has acquired 1.62 lakh shares of Cospower Engineering Ltd via preferential allotment, which amounts to 8.82% of the total share capital and voting rights. This acquisition does not involve any encumbrance or warrants, and the shares were credited on March 06, 2026. The total diluted share and voting capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 1,83,65,000 (18,36,500 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 Each). This information was disclosed to the stock exchanges but shall not be disseminated.

  • Swapna Gunda acquired 1.62 lakh shares of Cospower Engineering Ltd
  • The acquisition was made via preferential allotment
  • The shares acquired represent 8.82% of the total share capital and voting rights
  • The acquisition does not involve any encumbrance or warrants
  • The shares were credited on March 06, 2026
  • The total diluted share and voting capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 1,83,65,000 (18,36,500 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 Each)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cospower Engineering Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ACHYUT] Achyut Healthcare Ltd: Akshit M Raycha HUF Acquires Shares Worth 0.005% of Total Voting Capital
item.description:
Akshit M Raycha HUF has acquired equity shares of Achyut Healthcare Ltd. through the open market. The total voting capital of Achyut Healthcare Ltd. is 1.93% after the acquisition, with 0.005% acquired by Akshit M Raycha HUF. The acquisition took place on March 12, 2026. The company's equity share capital and total voting capital remain unchanged at Rs.23,55,57,000/- (23,55,57,000 equity shares of Re.1/- each) before and after the acquisition.

  • Akshit M Raycha HUF acquired 10985 shares carrying voting rights of Achyut Healthcare Ltd.
  • The total voting capital of Achyut Healthcare Ltd. is now 1.93% after the acquisition.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market on March 12, 2026.
  • The company's equity share capital and total voting capital remain unchanged at Rs.23,55,57,000/- (23,55,57,000 equity shares of Re.1/- each) before and after the acquisition.
  • No encumbrances, VRs, warrants, or convertible securities were involved in the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Achyut Healthcare Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
